message:
Enhance UI context, improve error handling, and update dependencies

Comprehensive improvements across rch crates:

CLI (rch):
- Refactor command handling for cleaner dispatch
- Improve UI context with better state management
- Enhance doctor diagnostics with additional checks

Common:
- Improve error types with more specific variants
- Enhance progress display components
- Update logging helpers for e2e tests

Daemon (rchd):
- Refactor benchmark scheduler for better resource management
- Improve shutdown handling for graceful cleanup

Infrastructure:
- Update dependencies with security patches
- Expand README with usage examples

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
